name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement

## Problem

A clear and concise description of the problem or use case this feature would
address. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]".

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. If you have an idea
of the API (function names, arguments), sketch it here.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or examples here.
